description: Verify c_variadic feature isolation: only in printf_c_variadic.rs

build_all.description: Check that our rust codebase is healthy

constraint_build_all.description: Ensure our rust codebase is healthy

stable_toolchain.description: rust-toolchain.toml must use stable channel (c_variadic removed from lib crate)

shell_nightly.description: crust-sqlite-shell must use nightly toolchain (needs c_variadic, extern_types)

tclsqlite_nightly.description: crust-tclsqlite must use nightly toolchain (needs c_variadic, extern_types)

fts5_no_libc_global.description: Ensure fts5.rs contains no libc:: calls (only external C FFI allowed)
goals: fts5.rs must not contain libc:: direct calls
All C interop must go through safe wrappers or external C FFI only

fts5_no_libc_calls.description: fts5.rs must not contain libc:: calls - use safe wrappers or external C FFI instead

lib_exports.description: All C FFI symbols correctly exported in rlib binaries and cdylib
goals: Verify all 10 exported C FFI symbols are present as global symbols in shell/rustfixture binaries and in the cdylib dynamic symbol table
Each must have a C source file in c_code/

shell_symbols.cmd: SYMS=$(nm $PROJECT_ROOT/crust-sqlite-shell/target/release/sqlite3) && for sym in sqlite3_str_appendf sqlite3_snprintf sqlite3_mprintf sqlite3_vsnprintf sqlite3_vmprintf sqlite3_test_control sqlite3_db_config sqlite3_config sqlite3_vtab_config sqlite3_log; do echo "$SYMS" | grep -q "T ${sym}$" || { echo "missing $sym in shell"; exit 1; }; done && grep -q "export_name.*sqlite3_config_args" $PROJECT_ROOT/src/printf_c_variadic.rs
shell_symbols.description: Behavioral: all 10 symbols must be global (T) in the shell binary

rustfixture_symbols.cmd: SYMS=$(nm $PROJECT_ROOT/crust-tclsqlite/target/release/rustfixture) && for sym in sqlite3_str_appendf sqlite3_snprintf sqlite3_mprintf sqlite3_vsnprintf sqlite3_vmprintf sqlite3_test_control sqlite3_db_config sqlite3_config sqlite3_vtab_config sqlite3_log; do echo "$SYMS" | grep -q "T ${sym}$" || { echo "missing $sym in rustfixture"; exit 1; }; done && grep -q "export_name.*sqlite3_db_config_args" $PROJECT_ROOT/src/printf_c_variadic.rs
rustfixture_symbols.description: Behavioral: all 10 symbols must be global (T) in the rustfixture binary

cdylib_symbols.cmd: cd $PROJECT_ROOT && cargo build --release --lib 2>/dev/null && SYMS=$(nm -D target/release/libsqlite_noamalgam.so) && for sym in sqlite3_str_appendf sqlite3_snprintf sqlite3_mprintf sqlite3_vsnprintf sqlite3_vmprintf sqlite3_test_control sqlite3_db_config sqlite3_config sqlite3_vtab_config sqlite3_log; do echo "$SYMS" | grep -q "T ${sym}$" || { echo "missing $sym in cdylib"; exit 1; }; done && grep -q "export_name.*sqlite3_test_control_args" $PROJECT_ROOT/src/printf_c_variadic.rs
cdylib_symbols.description: Behavioral: all 10 symbols must appear in dynamic symbol table (T) of the cdylib

no_rust_variadic_exports.description: Negative: none of the 10 exported symbols must be Rust variadic extern fns — they live in C only
